data.name: Lunar's Chosen - Episode 2
data.detailed_description:
Lunar's chosen introduced a world of magic, danger, romance and sex. With a whole host of changes and improvements, animations and HD renders, the story continues in Lunar's Chosen Episode 2!

Continue your romances and relationships with the seven main characters, while also exploring a whole host of side characters and their own short stories.

The children of Lunar are ramping up their efforts to find you and anyone associated with you. You'd think after months of being unable to find you, they'd give up, but they're more determined than ever. Can you survive their attempts to capture you, while also keeping your loved ones safe?
data.about_the_game:
Lunar's chosen introduced a world of magic, danger, romance and sex. With a whole host of changes and improvements, animations and HD renders, the story continues in Lunar's Chosen Episode 2!

Continue your romances and relationships with the seven main characters, while also exploring a whole host of side characters and their own short stories.

The children of Lunar are ramping up their efforts to find you and anyone associated with you. You'd think after months of being unable to find you, they'd give up, but they're more determined than ever. Can you survive their attempts to capture you, while also keeping your loved ones safe?
data.short_description: Lunar's chosen introduced a world of magic, danger, romance and sex. With a whole host of changes and improvements, animations and HD renders, the story continues in Lunar's Chosen Episode 2!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Anything newer than Vista.
  • 處理器: One made in the last 10 years.
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Pretty much anything, if your monitors work, you're probably good.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X 10.6 or later

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+
  • 處理器: One made in the last 10 years.
  • 顯示卡: Same as the windows requirements, if you can read this, you're probably fine
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Anything newer than Vista.
  • Processor: One made in the last 10 years.
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Pretty much anything, if your monitors work, you're probably good.
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

linux_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+
  • Processor: One made in the last 10 years.
  • Graphics: Same as the windows requirements, if you can read this, you're probably fine
  • Storage: 3 GB available space
